title: draco fragrans
intro: Draco fragrans, also known as Dragon's Blood, is a plant-based resin extracted from the Croton lechleri tree or other related species, often used for its medicinal properties. The resin has been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. It also offers several health benefits, such as reducing pain, improving wound healing, and supporting digestive health. Draco fragrans is commonly used in herbal preparations, including tinctures, capsules, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
